usage_rules: Avoid bold weights for Playfair Display; prefer Light (300) or Regular (400) for elegance.
Use strict tracking: 'tracking-tighter' for large headings, 'tracking-wide' for captions.

texture.film_grain: fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-50 opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]

navigation.style: h-14 px-6 rounded-full bg-[#161618]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 flex items-center gap-8 shadow-2xl

VibeConsole.description: A modal interface for adjusting recommendation parameters.
VibeConsole.structure: Full-screen overlay with blur. Three vertical sliders (Brain Power, Mood, Energy).
VibeConsole.style: Sliders are tall vertical bars (h-64 w-12). Thumb is minimal or hidden (fill level indicates value). Active state glows Teal or Orange.

MovieCard.description: Minimal poster presentation with hover reveal.
MovieCard.structure: Image aspect-ratio 2/3. Hidden details that appear on hover.
MovieCard.interaction: Hover: Scale 1.05, subtle glow, metadata fade in. Click: Open detail view.

EmergencyButton.description: 'I Can't Even' button for instant comfort rewatch.
EmergencyButton.style: Prominent, distinct from nav. Maybe a floating element or central nav item. Uses #C0B283 (Muted Gold).
EmergencyButton.interaction: Click triggers 'Shutter Sound' and 'Flash' animation (white screen flash).

HeroSection.style: Full viewport height (min-h-[70vh]). Immersive background image with gradient fade to black at bottom.
HeroSection.content: Minimal text overlay: 'Vibe of the Day', Title, One-line synopsis.

icons.style: stroke-1 w-5 h-5 opacity-70 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure 'tailwind.config.js' to include the custom colors (#0A0A0B, #161618, #C0B283) and fonts.
Implement the 'Film Grain' overlay in 'App.js' or main layout as a fixed, pointer-events-none div.
Build the 'VibeConsole' as a Modal using Radix UI Dialog or similar primitive (headless), styled manually.
Ensure the 'Floating Horizon' nav bar is fixed at the bottom with glassmorphism.
Do not use default scrollbars. Hide them or style them thin and dark.
For the 'Safety Net' page, apply a CSS filter 'sepia(0.3)' to the container to give it a warm, nostalgic feel.
Implement the 'Shutter Flash' using a full-screen white div that flashes opacity 1 -> 0 in 100ms.
universal_guidelines: Dark Mode Only: No light mode toggle.
No Gradients on Text: Keep text solid Platinum (#E5E5E5) for readability.
Center Alignment is for Titles Only: Align body text to left.
Vertical Rhythm: Use multiples of 4 (1rem) for spacing. Prefer loose spacing (gap-6, gap-8).
Micro-Interactions: Every clickable element must have a visible hover state (opacity change, scale, or color shift).
Images: Always use 'object-cover' and handle loading states with a skeleton pulse.
